theory.canonical_statement: wolfram (* Canonical momentum coordinates *) π_ω := ∂ℒ/∂ω̇_gyro = I_gyro.ω_gyro + (g_factor μ_B/ℏ) μ_total π_r := ∂ℒ/∂ṙ_cm = m_total ṙ_cm (* Phase space Hamiltonian *) ℋ[Ψ, π, t] := π_ω·ω_gyro + π_r·ṙ_cm - ℒ_total[Ψ, Ψ̇, t] (* Poisson bracket on T*SO(3) *) {F, G}_Poisson := ∑ᵢ (∂F/∂qⁱ ∂G/∂πᵢ - ∂G/∂qⁱ ∂F/∂πᵢ) + ∑_{i,j,k} ε^{ijk} ωⁱ (∂F/∂ωʲ ∂G/∂ωᵏ) (* Hamilton's equations *) dΨ/dt = {Ψ, ℋ}_Poisson
theory.technical_interpretation: Technically, phase space is interpreted through the variables and operators present in the canonical relation. The equation support section should preserve these source equations in sequence so later proof and Wolfram passes operate on the same mathematical object.

canonical_equation.source_section_latex:
\[
wolfram (* Canonical momentum coordinates *) π_ω := ∂ℒ/∂ω̇_gyro = I_gyro.ω_gyro + (g_factor μ_B/ℏ) μ_total π_r := ∂ℒ/∂ṙ_cm = m_total ṙ_cm (* Phase space Hamiltonian *) ℋ[Ψ, π, t] := π_ω·ω_gyro + π_r·ṙ_cm - ℒ_total[Ψ, Ψ̇, t] (* Poisson bracket on T*SO(3) *) {F, G}_Poisson := ∑ᵢ (∂F/∂qⁱ ∂G/∂πᵢ - ∂G/∂qⁱ ∂F/∂πᵢ) + ∑_{i,j,k} ε^{ijk} ωⁱ (∂F/∂ωʲ ∂G/∂ωᵏ) (* Hamilton's equations *) dΨ/dt = {Ψ, ℋ}_Poisson
\]

equation_progression.latex: wolfram (* Canonical momentum coordinates *) π_ω := ∂ℒ/∂ω̇_gyro = I_gyro.ω_gyro + (g_factor μ_B/ℏ) μ_total π_r := ∂ℒ/∂ṙ_cm = m_total ṙ_cm (* Phase space Hamiltonian *) ℋ[Ψ, π, t] := π_ω·ω_gyro + π_r·ṙ_cm - ℒ_total[Ψ, Ψ̇, t] (* Poisson bracket on T*SO(3) *) {F, G}_Poisson := ∑ᵢ (∂F/∂qⁱ ∂G/∂πᵢ - ∂G/∂qⁱ ∂F/∂πᵢ) + ∑_{i,j,k} ε^{ijk} ωⁱ (∂F/∂ωʲ ∂G/∂ωᵏ) (* Hamilton's equations *) dΨ/dt = {Ψ, ℋ}_Poisson

wolfram (* Configuration bundle structure *) ConfigurationSpace := TangentBundle[SO(3) × ℝ³, ℝ⁶ × so(3)*] (* State vector in rotating frame *) Ψ[t] := { r_cm[t], (* Center of mass position: ℝ³ *) ω_gyro[t], (* Gyroscopic angular velocity: so(3) *) μ_constrained[t], (* Magnetic moment vector: ℝ³ *) L_mech[t] (* Mechanical angular momentum: ℝ³ *) } (* Rotation group action *) g[t] ∈ SO(3) : Ψ[t] ↦ Ad_g(Ψ[t])

wolfram (* Spacetime metric in rotating frame - Kerr-like structure *) g_μν[ω_gyro] := DiagonalMatrix[{ -c² + (ω_gyro × r)·(ω_gyro × r), 1, 1, 1 }] + {{0, -(ω_gyro × r)}, {-(ω_gyro × r)^T, 0_3×3}} (* Electromagnetic field strength tensor *) F_μν[r, t] := ( {{0, -E_x/c, -E_y/c, -E_z/c}, {E_x/c, 0, -B_z, B_y}, {E_y/c, B_z, 0, -B_x}, {E_z/c, -B_y, B_x, 0}} ) (* Frame-dragging correction terms *) F_μν^{rotating} = Λ^μ_α Λ^ν_β F^{αβ}_{lab} + (∂Λ^μ_α/∂x^β - ∂Λ^μ_β/∂x^α) A^α (* Where Λ is Lorentz transformation to rotating frame *) Λ^μ_ν[ω, r] := {{γ, -γ β·n̂}, {-γ β, I + (γ-1)n̂⊗n̂}} β := (ω × r)/c, γ := 1/√(1 - β²)

wolfram (* Opposing dipole configuration under gyroscopic constraint *) μ_total[t_, g[t_]] := Module[ {R = RotationMatrix[g[t]], σ_z = {{0,0,1}}}, (* Dipole moments in lab frame *) μ₁ = μ₀ R.σ_z, μ₂ = -μ₀ R.σ_z, (* Separation vector under compression *) d[t] = d_min + δd Exp[-t/τ_compression], (* Composite moment (with quantum corrections) *) μ_eff = μ₁ + μ₂ + ℏ/(2m_e c) ∇×(μ₁ × μ₂)/(4π ε₀ c² d[t]³) ] (* Constraint manifold *) ConstraintManifold := { μ₁·μ₂ = -μ₀², (* Anti-alignment *) |d[t]| = d_bolt, (* Mechanical fixation *) R^T R = Identity[3] (* Rotation orthogonality *) }

dictionary_sections.definition: phase space is a source-backed registry entry whose production form is anchored to the reviewed equation wolfram (* Canonical momentum coordinates *) π_ω := ∂ℒ/∂ω̇_gyro = I_gyro.ω_gyro + (g_factor μ_B/ℏ) μ_total π_r := ∂ℒ/∂ṙ_cm = m_total ṙ_cm (* Phase space Hamiltonian *) ℋ[Ψ, π, t] := π_ω·ω_gyro + π_r·ṙ_cm - ℒ_total[Ψ, Ψ̇, t] (* Poisson bracket on T*SO(3) *) {F, G}_Poisson := ∑ᵢ (∂F/∂qⁱ ∂G/∂πᵢ - ∂G/∂qⁱ ∂F/∂πᵢ) + ∑_{i,j,k} ε^{ijk} ωⁱ (∂F/∂ωʲ ∂G/∂ωᵏ) (* Hamilton's equations *) dΨ/dt = {Ψ, ℋ}_Poisson.
